executives.name: Anita Sands
executives.background: Former Group Managing Director and Head of Change Leadership at UBS Financial Services. She joined the board in 2020.

executives.name: John Doerr
executives.background: L. John Doerr has been a director since 1999. He is the Chairman of Kleiner Perkins, a venture capital firm.

executives.name: Richard Hill
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Novellus Systems. Former Chairman of Marvell (2016-2021).

executives.name: Thomas Seifert
executives.background: Thomas Seifert has served as our Chief Financial Officer since June 2017. From December 2012 to April 2017, Mr. Seifert served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Symantec Corporation, a cybersecurity software and services company. From 2009 to 2012, Mr. Seifert served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Advanced Micro Devices, Inc., a semiconductor company. From 2008 to 2009, Mr. Seifert served as Chief Operating Officer and Chief Financial Officer of Qimonda AG, a German memory chip manufacturer. Mr. Seifert currently serves on the board of directors of First Solar, Inc., a solar energy solutions company. Mr. Seifert holds a B.A. and an M.B.A. from Friedrich-Alexander University and an M.A. in Economics from Wayne State University.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
